BlogPost.title: Blog Post
BlogPost.description: A dynamic article for the BeinMe blog.

title.description: The main headline of the post.

content.description: The main body content of the article.

heroImageUrlDesktop.description: URL for the main hero image on desktop screens.

heroImageUrlMobile.description: URL for the main hero image on mobile screens.

/blogPosts/{postId}.description: Collection of blog articles managed by the admin. Rules allow read for everyone and write for authenticated users.
